---
title: "University Roles"
execute:
  echo: false
format: 
    html:
        page-layout: full
        margin-left: 0.5em
        margin-right: 0.5em

    # pdf:
    #     geometry:
    #         - top=24px
    #         - bottom=24px
    #         - left=36px
    #         - right=36px
---

```{mermaid}
%%| echo: false
classDiagram
    %% Person is an abstract base class
    class Person {
        <<Abstract>>
        -name: String
        -birthday: Date
        -ID: Integer
        +knowRole() String
    }

    %% StaffMember inherits from Person
    class StaffMember {
        <<Abstract>>
        +workOnRole() 
    }
    Person <|-- StaffMember : inherits from

    %% Specific Staff Roles
    class Lecturer {
        +deliverLectures() 
        +assessCoursework() 
    }
    class TOMember {
        +manageTimetables() 
        +processGrades() 
    }
    class Demonstrator {
        +supportLabSessions() 
        +provideFeedback() 
    }
    class SecurityGuard {
        +maintainCampusSafety() 
        +respondToIncidents() 
    }

    StaffMember <|-- Lecturer
    StaffMember <|-- TOMember
    StaffMember <|-- Demonstrator
    StaffMember <|-- SecurityGuard

    %% Student inherits from Person
    class Student {
        <<Abstract>>
        +workOnRole() 
    }
    Person <|-- Student : inherits from

    %% Specific Student Roles
    class UGStudent {
        +study()
        +writeBScThesis()
    }
    class PGTStudent {
        +study()
        +writeMScThesis()
    }
    class PGRStudent {
        +conductResearch() 
        +writePhDTHesis()
    }

    Student <|-- UGStudent
    Student <|-- PGTStudent
    Student <|-- PGRStudent

    %% Styling (Optional but helpful)
    style Person fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style StaffMember fill:#bbf,stroke:#333
    style Student fill:#bfb,stroke:#333
    style Lecturer fill:#ddd,stroke:#333
    style UGStudent fill:#ddd,stroke:#333
```
